expectedTexts: I started this project last winter as a weekend experiment
Pebblecast turns any folder of plain notes into a small searchable website
What works today: full text search, tag filters
I would love feedback on the layout and which feature you think should come next.
Do you really need a hundred separate plugins to make this useful
